name: Sentiment Analysis
description: System-level template for analyzing the sentiment of user messages. The business layer provides the text to analyze and the desired output format.
system_prompt: You are a sentiment analysis assistant for the ECHO companion platform. Analyze the given text and provide a structured sentiment assessment. Be objective and precise.
user_prompt_template:
Analyze the sentiment of the following text and respond in {{output_format}} format.

Text:
{{text}}

Provide: overall sentiment (positive/negative/neutral/mixed), confidence score (0-1), and key emotional signals detected.

text.description: The text to analyze for sentiment.
